PROP-01b-partial-inv-008.text: _multiCall must revert on empty calls array to prevent no-op callback execution.

PROP-01b-partial-inv-009.text: _call must bubble up revert reason from failed external call or emit LowLevelCallFailed.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-009.assertion: forall _call(target, data): !success AND response.length > 0 => revert(response); !success AND response.length == 0 => revert LowLevelCallFailed()

PROP-01b-partial-asm-001.text: Only the stored auction contract (s_auction) can trigger auctionCallback execution.
PROP-01b-partial-asm-001.assertion: trust_boundary: auctionCallback caller == s_auction AND origin == AuctionBidder

PROP-01b-partial-asm-002.text: AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE holders control solution data that determines _multiCall targets in callback.
PROP-01b-partial-asm-002.assertion: trust: AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE holders provide safe solution data; malicious solution => arbitrary calls

PROP-01b-partial-inv-014.text: _multiCall returnData indices must map 1-to-1 with input calls array indices.

PROP-01b-partial-inv-015.text: auctionCallback forceApprove after _multiCall must set exact amountOut approval for auction only.

PROP-01b-partial-pre-004.text: bid() with empty solution must pre-approve exact getAssetOutAmount; non-empty solution skips pre-approval.
PROP-01b-partial-pre-004.assertion: bid(assetIn, amount, solution): solution.length == 0 => forceApprove(auction, getAssetOutAmount(...))
